[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01001000 2
3 00100100 2
4 01000010 2
5 10110100 4
6 00010001 2
7 10010001 3

01 10 00000010 1
12 21 00010010 2
23 32 01010001 3
34 43 10010101 4
45 54 10010001 3 match 7
56 65 10011000 3
67 76 01101000 3
70 07 01001000 2 match 2

02 20 01000010 2 match 4
13 31 10110100 4 match 5
24 42 00010001 2 match 6
35 53 10010001 3 match 7
46 64 10010000 2
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 01001000 2 match 2
71 17 00100100 2 match 3

03 30 01000000 1
14 41 10010100 3
25 52 00010011 3
36 63 11110000 4
47 74 00000100 1
50 05 00001010 2
61 16 10110000 3
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 00000000 a match 0 1
15 51 10010010 3
26 62 01010000 2
37 73 01100100 3
